_comment: Main_4_train_and_evaluate_tree_models_IO.ipynb — exit-plane tree baselines; optional BayesSearchCV tuning (off by default). Keys consumed: top-level test_size/random_state/models_to_train; random_forest, xgboost, gradient_boosting, adaboost blocks; tuning.*. See docs/ML_CONFIG_GUIDE.md.
_processed_stem_comment: Pins data/processed/features_targets_training_data_complete_<stem>.pkl (course default: the sample150 release dataset). Set to null to fall back to the newest features_targets_*.pkl, e.g. after exporting your own Main_3 campaign.

tuning._comment: BayesSearchCV budget for Section 7, only used when IF_HYPERPARAM_TUNING=True (off by default). Course default n_iter=20 fits free Colab; research-scale value was 60.
